title: Chinese Consumer Market Under New Pressure
section_path: Chinese Consumer Market Under New Pressure
section_path_text: Chinese Consumer Market Under New Pressure
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As has been widely reported, China's retail sales in August grew year-on-year by only 2.5% and marked a drastic change from the 8.5% year-on-year growth seen in July. The growth also marked the lowest seen since August 2020. The government now needs to have consumer spending significantly improve if China's overall economy is to be able to enjoy at least moderate growth as desired.
